/usr/bin/c++  -march=native -Werror -Wfatal-errors -Wpedantic -pedantic-errors      -Wall -Wextra -ftemplate-backtrace-limit=1 -Wno-unknown-pragmas -Wno-sign-compare -O3 CMakeFiles/ConvertGraph.dir/ConvertGraph.cc.o -o ConvertGraph   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libproj.so -lroutingkit
